channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: hesreallyhim /awesome-claude-code | Python | N/A
item.description: A curated list of awesome skills, hooks, slash-commands, agent orchestrators, applications, and plugins for Claude Code by Anthropic

item.title: iptv-org /iptv | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Collection of publicly available IPTV channels from all over the world

item.title: czlonkowski /n8n-mcp | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: A MCP for Claude Desktop / Claude Code / Windsurf / Cursor to build n8n workflows for you

item.title: kepano /obsidian-skills | N/A | N/A
item.description: Agent skills for Obsidian. Teach your agent to use Markdown, Bases, JSON Canvas, and use the CLI.

item.title: hsliuping /TradingAgents-CN | Python | N/A
item.description: 基于多智能体LLM的中文金融交易框架 - TradingAgents中文增强版

item.title: jingyaogong /minimind | Python | N/A
item.description: 🚀🚀 「大模型」2小时完全从0训练26M的小参数GPT！🌏 Train a 26M-parameter GPT from scratch in just 2h!

item.title: NousResearch /hermes-agent | Python | N/A
item.description: The agent that grows with you

item.title: affaan-m /everything-claude-code | JavaScript | N/A
item.description: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

item.title: tinygrad /tinygrad | Python | N/A
item.description: You like pytorch? You like micrograd? You love tinygrad! ❤️

item.title: TauricResearch /TradingAgents | Python | N/A
item.description: TradingAgents: Multi-Agents LLM Financial Trading Framework

item.title: browser-use /browser-use | Python | N/A
item.description: 🌐 Make websites accessible for AI agents. Automate tasks online with ease.

item.title: vxcontrol /pentagi | Go | N/A
item.description: Fully autonomous AI Agents system capable of performing complex penetration testing tasks

item.title: Crosstalk-Solutions /project-nomad | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Project N.O.M.A.D, is a self-contained, offline survival computer packed with critical tools, knowledge, and AI to keep you informed and empowered—anytime, anywhere.

item.title: bytedance /deer-flow | Python | N/A
item.description: An open-source SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.

item.title: FujiwaraChoki /MoneyPrinterV2 | Python | N/A
item.description: Automate the process of making money online.
